; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-04-18T19:02:57Z

AFFECT [[1658694193319203921]]
    IMPORT [[7081846004279]] [[180927.180926]]

    TRAVERSE [[6502786168]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
            property ~&214620122227&~ penLayerMemory: _penLayerMemorySettings.~&233726547792244&~

            ~&6502786168&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: _penLayerMemorySettings
                property ~&6503679477&~ ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~

                ~&7712198086779994&~ {
                    ~&7712874798136519&~: "rmitchellscott.penLayerMemory"
                    property ~&214620122227&~ ~&233726547792244&~: _penLayerMemorySettings.~&233726547792244&~
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[11704595946725378272]]
    IMPORT [[7082546018834]] [[180922.180921]]

    TRAVERSE [[454089850271038938]]#[[6504254477]] > [[254480451320573660]]#[[16710723433319324941]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[233724020048228]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[425121728314878811.15740235808997988493]]
        INSERT {
            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&9979845002513357992&~ {
                ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("Remember layers")
                ~&233723734822480&~: ~&7082020628281&~.penLayerMemory
                ~&254542236275632405&~: ~&7082020628281&~.penLayerMemory = !~&7082020628281&~.penLayerMemory
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
            readonly property ~&7083178290016&~ _penLayerFilePath: "file:///home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/%1/penLayers.rm"
            readonly property ~&7083178290016&~ _penLayerRmHeader: "reMarkable .lines file, version=6          "

            function _penLayerLoad() {
                ~&233745975898428&~._toolLayerMap = ({});
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&7712934851008712&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
                ~&197102514&~ req =  new  XMLHttpRequest();
                req.~&6504147419&~("GET", _penLayerFilePath.~&197080195&~(~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~));
                req.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    ~&5972376&~ (req.readyState === XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
                        try {
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&6504315758&~ = req.responseText || "";
                            ~&197102514&~ jsonStart = ~&6504315758&~.~&233731717342038&~("{");
                            ~&5972376&~ (jsonStart >= 0) {
                                ~&233745975898428&~._toolLayerMap = ~&6502785411&~.parse(~&6504315758&~.~&254548200562243306&~(jsonStart));
                                ~&233745975898428&~._applyToolLayerMemory();
                            }
                        } catch (~&180974&~) {}
                    }
                };
                req.~&6504279475&~();
            }

            function _penLayerSave() {
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&7712934851008712&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
                ~&197102514&~ req =  new  XMLHttpRequest();
                req.~&6504147419&~("PUT", _penLayerFilePath.~&197080195&~(~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~));
                req.~&6504279475&~(_penLayerRmHeader + ~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(~&233745975898428&~._toolLayerMap));
            }

            ~&428051690305612204&~ {
                ~&7083194890448&~: ~&6504254477&~
                function ~&13184053911240945935&~() {
                    _penLayerLoad();
                }
            }

            ~&428051690305612204&~ {
                ~&7083194890448&~: ~&6504254477&~
                function ~&2104365313657427216&~() {
                    ~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(~&233745975898428&~._applyToolLayerMemory);
                }
            }
        }

    TRAVERSE [[6502786168]]#[[15549782143769420265]]
    TRAVERSE [[233704648923420]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
            property ~&197102514&~ _toolLayerMap: ({})
            property ~&197088788&~ _lastTool: -1
            property ~&197088788&~ _appliedForPage: -1
            property ~&6503679477&~ _applyingLayer: ~&214625660372&~

            property ~&197088788&~ _currentPenTool: {
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&233745975898428&~.~&501100168435426133&~) ~&7083121450889&~ -1;
                ~&197102514&~ ~&5972621&~ = ~&233745975898428&~.~&501100168435426133&~.~&496507535093048780&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (~&5972621&~ !== ~&"233740920352621&~ && ~&5972621&~ !== ~&"254547519794454865&~) ~&7083121450889&~ -1;
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&233745975898428&~.~&501100168435426133&~.~&197096108&~.~&6504326343&~;
            }

            on_CurrentPenToolChanged: {
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&7082020628281&~.penLayerMemory) ~&7083121450889&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (~&233745975898428&~._currentPenTool < 0) ~&7083121450889&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (~&233745975898428&~._lastTool >= 0 && ~&233745975898428&~._lastTool !== ~&233745975898428&~._currentPenTool) {
                    ~&233745975898428&~._toolLayerMap[~&233745975898428&~._lastTool] = ~&11179472971324505115&~.~&15752433948179392809&~;
                    _penLayerSave();
                }
                ~&233745975898428&~._lastTool = ~&233745975898428&~._currentPenTool;
                ~&233745975898428&~._appliedForPage = -1;
                ~&233745975898428&~._applyToolLayerMemory();
            }

            function _applyToolLayerMemory() {
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&7082020628281&~.penLayerMemory) ~&7083121450889&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (~&233745975898428&~._currentPenTool < 0) ~&7083121450889&~;
                ~&197102514&~ ~&6504326343&~ = ~&233745975898428&~._currentPenTool;
                ~&233745975898428&~._lastTool = ~&6504326343&~;
                ~&197102514&~ targetLayer = ~&233745975898428&~._toolLayerMap[~&6504326343&~];
                ~&5972376&~ (targetLayer === ~&254550717068498203&~ || targetLayer < 0) ~&7083121450889&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (~&233745975898428&~._appliedForPage === ~&6504254477&~.~&477346483278306569&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
                ~&233745975898428&~._appliedForPage = ~&6504254477&~.~&477346483278306569&~;
                ~&197102514&~ currentCount = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092719&~(~&233745975898428&~.~&490211772217843434&~.~&214622615378&~, 1);
                ~&197102514&~ layersToAdd = targetLayer - currentCount + 1;
                ~&233745975898428&~._applyingLayer = ~&6504329801&~;
                ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < layersToAdd && ~&180978&~ < 4; ~&180978&~++) {
                    ~&11179472971324505115&~.~&7712792779634991&~();
                }
                ~&11179472971324505115&~.~&15004695017937738005&~(targetLayer);
                ~&233745975898428&~._applyingLayer = ~&214625660372&~;
            }

            ~&428051690305612204&~ {
                ~&7083194890448&~: ~&11179472971324505115&~
                function ~&13902492065772060880&~() {
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&233745975898428&~._applyingLayer) ~&7083121450889&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (!~&7082020628281&~.penLayerMemory) ~&7083121450889&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&233745975898428&~._currentPenTool < 0) ~&7083121450889&~;
                    ~&233745975898428&~._toolLayerMap[~&233745975898428&~._currentPenTool] = ~&11179472971324505115&~.~&15752433948179392809&~;
                    _penLayerSave();
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
